charge.label: Obtaining jewellery by false pretences
elements: The defendant is the person who met the complainant
The defendant made the pretences alleged
The complainant parted with property because of them

clearance.descendants_risk_note: Historical fraud trial; all participants deceased. Descendant reputational risk to be reviewed at operator clearance (EX-3).

content_notes: Identification-heavy fraud trial. No graphic content.
Historical case C-001 — trial phase complete; truth file gated until verdict.
